PUPPET_FILE
  Puppet: CLASS_DEFINITION
    PsiElement(CLASS)('class')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetFqnContainerImpl(FQN_CONTAINER)
      Puppet: NAMESPACE_DEFINITION
        PsiElement(NAME)('profile')
      PsiElement(::)('::')
      PsiElement(NAME)('test')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(=)('=')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
          PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''hello world'')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var2')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(=)('=')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetExpressionIndexedImpl(EXPRESSION_INDEXED)
          PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('split')
            PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
              PsiElement(()('(')
              Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                PsiElement($)('$')
                PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var')
              PsiElement(,)(',')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)('' '')
              PsiElement())(')')
          PsiPuppetExpressionIndexImpl(EXPRESSION_INDEX)
            PsiElement([)('[')
            PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
              PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('0')
            PsiElement(])(']')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiComment(COMMENT)('# example 1')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
        PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
        PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
          PsiElement(()('(')
          PsiPuppetExpressionIndexedImpl(EXPRESSION_INDEXED)
            PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
              PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                PsiElement(NAME)('split')
              PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
                PsiElement(()('(')
                Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                  PsiElement($)('$')
                  PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var')
                PsiElement(,)(',')
                PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                  PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)('' '')
                PsiElement())(')')
            PsiPuppetExpressionIndexImpl(EXPRESSION_INDEX)
              PsiElement([)('[')
              PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
                PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('0')
              PsiElement(])(']')
          PsiElement())(')')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiComment(COMMENT)('# example 2')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
        PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
        PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
          PsiElement(()('(')
          PsiPuppetExpressionIndexedImpl(EXPRESSION_INDEXED)
            PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
              PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                PsiElement(NAME)('split')
              PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
                PsiElement(()('(')
                Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                  PsiElement($)('$')
                  PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var')
                PsiElement(,)(',')
                PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                  PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)('' '')
                PsiElement())(')')
            PsiPuppetExpressionIndexImpl(EXPRESSION_INDEX)
              PsiElement([)('[')
              PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
                PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('0')
              PsiElement(])(']')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetExpressionIndexedImpl(EXPRESSION_INDEXED)
            PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
              PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                PsiElement(NAME)('split')
              PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
                PsiElement(()('(')
                Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                  PsiElement($)('$')
                  PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var')
                PsiElement(,)(',')
                PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                  PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)('' '')
                PsiElement())(')')
            PsiPuppetExpressionIndexImpl(EXPRESSION_INDEX)
              PsiElement([)('[')
              PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
                PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('0')
              PsiElement(])(']')
          PsiElement())(')')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiComment(COMMENT)('# example 3')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
